description: Note to a certain Nāsir (al-muʿallim is likely an honorific rather than meaning an actual teacher). In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 13th or 14th century. Mentions a number of goods in pounds (raṭl) sent with the bearer, including from a certain Ibn [ʿAbd] al-Raḥmān. Possibly sent by Abū Mūsā, or else the sender is mentioning other goods from him. (Information in part from CUDL.)
